description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The front facade features large glass windows and sliding doors on both levels, with a prominent balcony on the upper floor and a recessed entryway below. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray, with simple railings and no ornate detailing. The sides and rear of the house are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The structure sits on a raised, rectangular platform, suggesting an urban or suburban lot. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a balcony, finished in white and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, balcony, and recessed entryway.
description_view_1: Left side view with mostly solid walls and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying several rectangular windows and a simple, flat facade.
description_view_3: Right side view with solid walls and a small balcony extension visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows and minimal side openings
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway beneath the balcony, with a simple door and no decorative elements
